We are proud to announce that the project titled “Modeling the MVRPCD Problem with Three-Dimensional Loading Constraints and Developing a New Hybrid Metaheuristic Algorithm”, led by one of our esteemed Industrial Engineering faculty members, Prof. Dr. Funda Samanlıoğlu, has been awarded funding under the TÜBİTAK ARDEB 1001 Program.

We congratulate our professor and wish him success in his research.
